googlePlayStore.title: ChemNOR - AI Chemistry Assistant
googlePlayStore.shortDescription: Your Intelligent Chemistry Assistant, Powered by AI
googlePlayStore.fullDescription:
🧪 Welcome to ChemNOR - The ultimate AI-powered chemistry companion!

ChemNOR brings advanced chemistry tools and artificial intelligence to your fingertips. Search chemical compounds, analyze molecular structures, and chat with an AI chemist—all in one sleek, user-friendly application.

✨ KEY FEATURES:

🔍 COMPOUND SEARCH
Search chemical compounds by name or formula using natural language. Get instant access to detailed properties, molecular weights, chemical formulas, and PubChem images.

🤖 AI CHEMISTRY CHAT
Chat with an AI assistant about any chemical compound or chemistry topic. Get context-aware answers powered by the ChemNOR and Gemini APIs.

🧪 ADVANCED CHEMISTRY TOOLS
Use specialized chemistry tools including the 'chemist' function for deeper structural and property analysis.

📜 CHAT HISTORY
Save and revisit your chemistry discussions locally. Long-press entries to copy text or delete them.

⚙️ CUSTOMIZABLE SETTINGS
Configure API keys, adjust font sizes, and personalize your experience.

🎨 MODERN, RESPONSIVE UI
Enjoy a beautiful interface with stylish navigation, Markdown rendering, mathematical formula support, and fully responsive design.

💡 PERFECT FOR:
• High school and university chemistry students
• Chemistry teachers and educators
• Research professionals and chemists
• Chemistry enthusiasts and hobbyists

🔐 PRIVACY & SECURITY:
ChemNOR respects your privacy. API keys are stored securely on your device.

Version 1.0.0 - Initial Release

🎉 Welcome to ChemNOR v1.0.0!

This is the official launch of ChemNOR, your AI-powered chemistry assistant.
